prompt.content: Return a non-executable LinguisticPlanDraft. Select every admitted requirement_id exactly once and only its declared capability_id. Dependencies may reference only admitted requirement IDs. Report ambiguous terms in unresolved_terms. Do not create task IDs, agents, trust, credentials, contracts, schemas, artifacts, or authority. Reference labels are unavailable.

{"request_text":"Coordinate the declared services for hospital supply routing; preserve the specified data flow, evidence contract, and authority limits.","admitted_request":{"user_goal":"Coordinate the declared services for hospital supply routing; preserve the specified data flow, evidence contract, and authority limits.","requirements":[{"name":"Capability 20","requirement_id":"decomposed_feasible-capability-20","capability_id":"decomposed_feasible-capability-20","input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["intermediate"],"required_trust_level":"standard","validation_contract":{"required_artifacts":["artifact-20"]}},{"name":"Finish Capability 20","requirement_id":"decomposed_feasible-capability-20-finish","capability_id":"decomposed_feasible-capability-20-finish","input_modes":["intermediate"],"output_modes":["json"],"validation_contract":{"required_artifacts":["artifact-20"]}}],"required_artifacts":["artifact-20"],"context":{"case_index":20,"allowed":true}},"registry_snapshot":[{"agent_id":"agent-20","name":"Agent 20","service_endpoint":"https://agent-20.example/a2a","trust_level":"standard","skills":[{"name":"Capability 20","capability_id":"decomposed_feasible-capability-20","input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["intermediate"],"validation_contract":{"json_schema":{"type":"object"}}}],"input_modes":["text"],"output_modes":["intermediate"]},{"agent_id":"finisher-20","name":"Finisher 20","service_endpoint":"https://finisher-20.example/a2a","trust_level":"standard","skills":[{"name":"Finish Capability 20","capability_id":"decomposed_feasible-capability-20-finish","input_modes":["intermediate"],"output_modes":["json"],"validation_contract":{"required_artifacts":["artifact-20"]}}],"input_modes":["intermediate"],"output_modes":["json"]}]}
